rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Rundll32 Activity Invoking Sys File

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Rundll32 Activity Invoking Sys File
id: 731231b9-0b5d-4219-94dd-abb6959aa7ea
status: test
description: Detects suspicious process related to rundll32 based on command line
  that includes a *.sys file as seen being used by UNC2452
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/04/goldmax-goldfinder-sibot-analyzing-nobelium-malware/
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-03-05
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    CommandLine|contains: rundll32.exe
  selection2:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - .sys,
    - '.sys '
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
